description: Running terraform apply with auto-approve so an unreviewed destroy or replace executes against live infrastructure.
body: Failure mode: a pipeline or operator runs terraform apply -auto-approve (or apply without a saved plan), and a diff that destroys or replaces a stateful resource executes with no human review. Detection signals: apply logs show destroy/replace of a database, volume, or load balancer; an outage follows a routine change; CI uses -auto-approve on production. Do not auto-approve applies on stateful or production infrastructure. Safer fallback: produce a saved plan, require human review of all destroys/replaces, apply only the reviewed plan file, and gate production applies behind manual approval.
